channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: New Mexico basketball player allegedly punched walk-on teammate over plane seat: reports
item.description: Two members of the New Mexico men's basketball were reportedly involved in a argument over a seat on a plane last month resulting in one player being punched, according to reports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tom Brady explains why he has 'mixed emotions' after seeing Azeez Al-Shaair's brutal hit on Trevor Lawrence
item.description: Tom Brady gave his opinion on the Azeez Al-Shaair hit against Trevor Lawrence, which led to an NFL suspension, and he questioned why the defense is always the ones at fault.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Religious beliefs put two captains in spotlight during Premier League's Rainbow Laces campaign
item.description: The captains of two Premier League teams are in the spotlight for their choices as the competition celebrates LGBTQ+ inclusion in its campaign to promote equality and diversity. Rainbow-colored captain armbands were issued to the 20 clubs for matches last weekend and the current midweek round.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: USWNT beats Netherlands 2-1 in goalkeeper Alyssa Naeher's final match
item.description: Alyssa Naher made two critical saves in her final match for the United States, Lynn Williams scored the go-ahead goal in the 71st minute and the Americans beat the Netherlands 2-1.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trans female weightlifter takes USA Powerlifting lawsuit to Minnesota Supreme Court
item.description: A transgender powerlifter has taken a yearslong case of discrimination to the Minnesota Supreme Court, with opening arguments beginning on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texans' Azeez Al-Shaair suspended 3 games without pay after violent hit on Trevor Lawrence
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Houston's Azeez Al-Shaair was suspended by the NFL without pay for three games Tuesday for repeated violations of player safety rules following his violent hit to the head of Jacksonville's Trevor Lawrence, which led to a concussion.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tiger Woods has no firm answers on a deal with Saudis or his future as a player
item.description: Tiger Woods could not offer much of a timetable Tuesday on PGA Tour negotiations with the Saudi backers of LIV Golf or his own future as a player. Woods is the tournament host of the Hero World Challenge this week, and that's his only role at Albany Golf Club in the Bahamas.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Charles Barkley, Mark Cuban agree their presidential ticket would win White House
item.description: Charles Barkley and Mark Cuban both agreed that a ticket featuring the both of them would win the presidency handily. They made their claim last week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: ESPN star Stephen A Smith tells Democrats to 'shut up' after election failure, spending scandal
item.description: ESPN star Stephen A. Smith told Democrats they needed to "shut up" after a demoralizing election defeat at the hands of President-elect Donald Trump and Republicans.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Matthews scores first goal since return from injury, Maple Leafs beat Blackhawks 4-1
item.description: Auston Matthews scored his first goal since returning from injury as the Toronto Maple Leafs defeated the Chicago Blackhawks 4-1 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Mollie Marcoux Samaan stepping down as LPGA commissioner after 3 1/2 years of record prize money
item.description: Mollie Marcoux Samaan is resigning in January as LPGA commissioner, a surprise announcement Monday after record growth in prize money along with criticism the LPGA wasn't gaining in popularity during the surge in women's sports. Marcoux Samaan is leaving on Jan.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: McCaffrey injury potentially rules him out for rest of season
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — San Francisco running back Christian McCaffrey suffered a knee injury that coach Kyle Shanahan described as “potentially” season-ending in the 49ers’ 35-10 loss to the Buffalo Bills on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: TCU, Duke climb into top 10, Notre Dame drops in women's AP Top 25; UCLA and UConn remain 1-2
item.description: TCU has grabbed its best ranking ever in The Associated Press Top 25 women's basketball poll on Monday after a convincing win over Notre Dame as the rankings got a shakeup following a holiday tournament week marked by key losses. The Horned Frogs climbed eight spots to No.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ryan Poles to remain Bears general manager and lead search for new head coach
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. (AP) — While his first head coaching hire is now out, Ryan Poles is still the general manager of the Chicago Bears — for now.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: CU Buffs await bowl selection
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Colorado Buffaloes won't be heading to the Big 12 title game, but they're still sitting comfortably in the AP Top 25 at No. 20. With nine wins, including seven in conference play, it's a season most Buffs fans would call a success. Now, it's a waiting game.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: McLaughlin's field goal in OT helps Bucs beat Panthers 26-23, move into 1st-place tie in NFC South
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers beat the Carolina Panthers 26-23 in overtime on a 30-yard field goal by Chase McLaughlin on Sunday to move into a tie for first place in the NFC South.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Gus Malzahn is leaving UCF to become Florida State's offensive coordinator, AP source says
item.description: Gus Malzahn is resigning as Central Florida's head coach to become Florida State's offensive coordinator, a person familiar with the hire told The Associated Press on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bears fire coach Matt Eberflus after skid marked by poor decisions late in games
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Matt Eberflus was fired by the Chicago Bears on Friday, one day after botching a timeout in a loss at Detroit. Offensive coordinator Thomas Brown will serve as interim coach, the Bears said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN and ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation
